about.title: About Sounds Of
about.content:
Sounds Of is the radio arm of Brewing Folk — a record shop, community hub and cultural space in Falmouth, Cornwall.

We believe music is a living thing. Something to be shared, discovered and felt together.

Our contributors are locals, travellers and music obsessives who bring their own worlds to the airwaves. From late-night jazz to sun-bleached electronics, from deep soul to spoken word — this is our corner of the dial.

Tune in. Turn it up.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.content: Want to pitch a show? Collaborate? Just say hello? We'd love to hear from you.
